palette_schemes.rothko_warm: Glowing reds, ochres, and burnt sienna over soft dark grounds.
palette_schemes.rothko_cool: Deep teals, indigos, and slate blues with a soft luminous edge.
palette_schemes.mondrian_primary: Pure primary reds, blues, yellows with stark whites and blacks.
palette_schemes.ukiyo_indigo: Indigo, bone white, and persimmon — Japanese woodblock palette.
palette_schemes.sumi_mono: Ink black on warm paper white — sumi-e monochrome.
palette_schemes.pollock_earth: Dripped earth tones: burnt umber, ochre, bone, charcoal.
palette_schemes.nocturne: Midnight blues and silvers with a single warm spark.
palette_schemes.pastel_sorbet: Soft peach, mint, lavender — gentle and airy.
palette_schemes.noir: Deep blacks, silvers, and one accent — film noir grading.
palette_schemes.klimt_gold: Gold leaf warm yellows with crimson and viridian accents.
palette_schemes.matisse_cutouts: Flat saturated reds, blues, and greens against off-white.

atmosphere_styles.noir_vignette: Dark vignette pulling the eye to center; cinematic.
atmosphere_styles.golden_hour: Warm late-afternoon glow washed across the canvas.
atmosphere_styles.bloom: Soft luminous bloom around bright areas.

background_styles.flat_wash: Single solid color filling the canvas.
background_styles.sky_band: Two horizontal bands suggesting sky and ground.

form_types.primary_grid: Bold rectangular grid in primary colors over white — Mondrian feel.
form_types.radial_burst: Wedges fanning out from a center point — sun, mandala.
form_types.organic_blobs: Soft fused blobs from summed Gaussians — biomorphic.
form_types.architectural_arches: Series of arches suggesting an arcade.
form_types.silhouette_horizon: Solid silhouette below a noisy horizon line.

texture_styles.static_noise: Fine random noise across the surface.

accent_styles.drip_marks: Vertical paint drips falling from above.
